{# next.dj override of Shibuya's landing layout. Overrides `document` to render a full-bleed marketing page while keeping the real banner, site header, and site footer. The index.rst body (only hidden toctrees) is intentionally dropped. #} {%- extends "layout.html" -%} {%- block extrahead -%} {% include "components/meta-opengraph.html" %} {%- endblock -%} {%- block document -%} {%- include "partials/banner.html" -%} {%- block header -%} {% include "partials/site-head.html" with context %} {%- endblock -%}
{% include "landing/hero.html" %} {% include "landing/features.html" %} {% include "landing/cta.html" %}
{%- endblock -%}
